data.name: Furry Pride
data.detailed_description:
A short puzzle game featuring beautiful furry characters. Enjoy relaxing music and a cozy yet spicy atmosphere—perfect for unwinding after a long day at work.

Features:

  • Engaging gameplay

  • Full HD artwork

  • Soothing music

  • LGBTQ+ friendly

  • The ideal way to spend your night alone (or with family, if you’re feeling brave!)

  • A great gift for furry lovers and even haters—just to troll them

  • Art by @ZHADART

data.short_description: An exciting casual puzzle game featuring beautiful furry characters. Enjoy an amazing atmosphere, great music, and high-quality furry artwork—perfect for relaxing. Created with love by furry lovers, for furry lovers!
data.supported_languages: 英文, 法文, 義大利文, 德文, 西班牙文 - 西班牙, 阿拉伯文, 保加利亞文, 捷克文, 丹麥文, 荷蘭文, 芬蘭文, 希臘文, 匈牙利文, 日文, 韓文, 挪威文, 波蘭文, 葡萄牙文 - 葡萄牙, 葡萄牙文 - 巴西, 羅馬尼亞文, 俄文, 簡體中文, 西班牙文 - 拉丁美洲, 瑞典文, 泰文, 繁體中文, 土耳其文, 烏克蘭文, 越南文

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統 *: Windows 7, 8, 10
  • 處理器: anything from this millenium
  • 顯示卡: 2 GB RAM
  • 音效卡: potato
